title: `utf8mb4_0900_bin` shouldn't write `RestoredData`
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name NVARCHAR(255), description NVARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'example', 'sample data');
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, value NVARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name = 'example' AND description IS NOT NULL;
